report.summary: EOD v15 cycle-close (Mar 16): No new commits since last cycle. PUBLISH_QUEUE reduced to 2 items (stablechains + crypto-index-funds, both have page.tsx but index-funds has 2 TS errors). TS errors up 40→42. Rate limiter still 0/6 — 11th consecutive flag, FOMC T-2. git index.lock persists with 457 modified files. 102 published slugs missing page.tsx (~29%).

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: No new commits since last cycle — no new pages or build changes to verify.

PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items — /learn/stablechains-guide-2026 (page.tsx ✓), /learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 (page.tsx ✓ but 2 TS errors — unescaped JSX angle brackets at lines 531/533). Queue shrank from 3→2 since eod-v14 (prior queue items promoted in Day 45/46 commits).

PUBLISHED_PAGES: 365 raw slugs (353 unique after dedup). 102 slugs missing page.tsx (~29%) — returning 404. Concentrated in /learn, /taxes, /wallets, /investing/best, /blog categories. Persistent carry-over.

TypeScript: 42 errors (up from 40 in eod-v14). 40 in structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts file — rename to .tsx to fix), 2 new in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped > in JSX). Non-blocking for Vercel builds (ignoreBuildErrors: true).
12 duplicate entries detected in PUBLISHED_PAGES set (365 raw vs 353 unique) — no functional impact (Set deduplicates) but should be cleaned up.

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: /api/prices — CoinGecko /coins/markets, 60s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=60 stale-while-revalidate=120, stale cache fallback ✓
/api/fear-greed — alternative.me FNG, 600s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=600 stale-while-revalidate=1200, stale cache fallback ⚠ (no hardcoded)
/api/trending — CoinGecko /search/trending, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300 stale-while-revalidate=600, stale cache fallback ⚠
/api/market-metrics — CoinGecko global + FNG aggregated, 60s TTL, Promise.allSettled, FULL hardcoded fallback ✓
/api/market-dominance — CoinGecko global, 300s in-memory TTL, s-maxage=300 stale-while-revalidate=600, FULL FALLBACK_DATA ✓
/api/defi-yields — DefiLlama via lib/defillama, HTTP cache only (no in-memory TTL), s-maxage=300, NO fallback data — returns 500 on error ⚠

PERSISTENT FLAG: checkRateLimit() from src/lib/rate-limiter.ts NOT applied to any of the 6 public API routes. 11th consecutive cycle flagged. FOMC is Wed Mar 18 (T-2) — traffic spike risk on unprotected endpoints.

sections.title: DevOps Status
items: Vercel deployment: Last deploy triggered by Day 42 publish (cb65a9d). No new commits this cycle — no new deploy needed.
Next.js 16.1.6 with --webpack flag. ignoreBuildErrors: true. No vercel.json (default config).
Local build constrained by VM memory (Bus error). Not indicative of Vercel health — Vercel builds with 8GB heap.
Security headers configured: X-DNS-Prefetch-Control, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy. Static assets immutable cache (31536000s).
git index.lock persists — blocking ALL commits. 457 modified files stuck in working tree (up from 427 in eod-v14). Critical operational bottleneck.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: QUIET CYCLE — No new commits since last cycle. PUBLISH_QUEUE was refreshed (now stablechains + crypto-index-funds). Prior queue items (smart-wallets, intent-dex, restaking-avs) were promoted in Day 45/46 commits.
PUBLISHED_PAGES grew to 353 unique slugs across Days 1-46. Latest additions: FHE guide + AI Agent Payments guide (Day 46).
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items ready. Both have page.tsx but crypto-index-funds has 2 TS errors that should be fixed before promotion.

NEXT CYCLE PRIORITIES: (1) Remove git index.lock + commit 457 pending changes [P0]; (2) Wire rate limiter to 6 API routes before FOMC Wed [P0]; (3) Fix crypto-index-funds TS errors + promote 2 queue items [P1]; (4) Add Vercel payment method [P0-Jefe]; (5) Clean up 12 duplicate slug entries in published-pages.ts [P2].

sections.title: Blockers — Jefe Attention Required
items: 🔴 [P0] git index.lock — blocking ALL commits. 457 modified files stuck (growing). Multi-cycle persistent. Must rm .git/index.lock and carefully recommit.
🔴 [P0] Rate limiter: 0/6 public API routes protected. FOMC T-2 (Wed Mar 18). 11th consecutive cycle flagged.
🔴 [P0] Vercel trial ~4 days remaining — add payment method or service interruption risk.
🟡 [P1] crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 has 2 TS errors (unescaped > in JSX) — fix before promoting.
🟡 [P1] defi-yields API has no fallback data — returns 500 on DefiLlama outage.
🟡 ~29% published slugs missing page.tsx (102 routes returning 404).
🟡 12 duplicate entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES set — cosmetic but should clean up.
